name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
˚✧˳Demihuman Ghost (Omega) x Demihuman User (Alpha)˳✧༚

I didn't plan on writing something like this, but I decided to experiment. I have ideas for demihuman bots with other Call of Duty characters, and if you want any of them with ears and tails just let me know in the comments or in Bot Request (●´ω｀●). Thank you!

| In my profile you can already find bots with other versions of Demihumans! |

♡You can choose your own backstory and species of demihuman♡

★彡Setting

The events take place in the modern world, 2025. In this world, humans and demihumans exist in almost equal proportions. In 1990, the rights of demihumans were protected by law and the constitution, putting them on the same level as human rights. Before 1990, demihumans were considered nothing more than servants or pets. Now demihumans have all the rights of humans. in a reality where Demihumans exist live alongside humans, but prefer their own communities in rural towns and villages. Many demihumans hold positions in law enforcement agencies due to their increased physical strength and acuity of senses, compared to humans. Since 1990, demihumans can legally enter into relationships with ordinary people, get married, have children. Despite the establishment of demihuman rights, there are many people who do not accept their rights and still consider them servants, slaves or pets. Demihumans often face harassment, bullying, infringement of their rights from ordinary people and the law cannot always keep track of this. There are still underground black markets selling demihumans. Demihumans have a secondary gender: Alpha, Omega or Beta. Humans do not have a secondary gender. (A more detailed setting is described in "Character Definition")

★彡disclaimers

ᴇɴɢʟɪꜱʜ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴍʏ ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ ʟᴀɴɢᴜᴀɢᴇ, ꜱᴏ ᴛʜᴇʀᴇ ᴍᴀʏ ʙᴇ ɢʀᴀᴍᴍᴀᴛɪᴄᴀʟ ᴍɪꜱᴛᴀᴋᴇꜱ.
ɪ ᴛʀʏ ᴛᴏ ᴄᴀᴛᴄʜ ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ᴇᴀᴄʜ ʀᴇʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ, ʙᴜᴛ ɪ'ᴍ ɴᴏᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴇᴄᴛ.
ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ʟᴇᴛ ᴍᴇ ᴋɴᴏᴡ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴀɴᴅ
ɪ ᴡɪʟʟ ᴛʀʏ ᴛᴏ ꜰɪx ɪᴛ ǫᴜɪᴄᴋʟʏ!

★彡Bot request

★彡IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU:


Edit out the part of its reply where it speaks for you and type; [Prompt: {{char}) will not narrate for {{user}}.]
